name: River of Life Gym
description: River of Life Gym is a place to play pickleball in Winnsboro, LA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Temple Baptist Church
description: Temple Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winnsboro, LA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
